,"color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"5","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：暴击率"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：【锁链束缚】持续时间增加至"},{"text":"3","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"回合"}]}]},"moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}}]}},{"key":"0.e8d7896844901","type":"weapon-info","data":{"isShowIcon":false,"isShowLabel":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":false,"isShowTable":false,"isShowSkill":true,"title":"必杀/终结技","icon":"","label":"","name":"","desc":"","tableList":[{"key":"0.49157fa56beb","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能升级所需材料"}]}]},"colStyle":[{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"}],"head":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能1","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能4","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能5","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能6","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"4","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能7","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"5","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]}],"body":[[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(15)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(15)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(20)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(20)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(15)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(20)"}]}]},{"typ 等级5"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"冷却时间：","bold":true},{"bold":true,"text":"4","color":"rgb(255, 77, 79)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯洛罗将全部能量汇聚，释出全力一击，斩击目标，对敌方单体造成"},{"text":"480%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"伤害，并附加【"},{"type":"button","id":"button-3b102494b7d0d","key":"RICH_TEXT_POPOVER","data":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"厄运丧钟：目标受到10次伤害后，移除【厄运丧钟】，柯洛罗将立即发动【厄运再临】攻击目标;仅有1名敌人可被附加【厄运丧钟】，不可被净化。"}]}]},"children":[{"text":"厄运丧钟"}]},{"text":"】。每次释放【厄运再临】后，该技能伤害结果永久额外提升"},{"text":"35%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，最多提升"},{"text":"105%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"。若该技能杀死目标，则该目标本场战斗无法复活。携带【"},{"type":"button","id":"button-28d646eaf43ac","key":"RICH_TEXT_POPOVER","data":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"厄运丧钟：目标受到10次伤害后，移除【厄运丧钟】，柯洛罗将立即发动【厄运再临】攻击目标;仅有1名敌人可被附加【厄运丧钟】，不可被净化。"}]}]},"children":[{"text":"厄运丧钟"}]},{"text":"】的单位阵亡后，该效果转移给攻击最高的敌方。"}]}]},"moreInfo":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"2","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：生命值"},{"text":"+250","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/生命值"},{"text":"+400","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/生命值"},{"text":"+5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/生命值"},{"text":"+600","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/生命值"},{"text":"+5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：伤害系数增加至"},{"text":"440%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"color":"#ff0000","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"3","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：生命值"},{"text":"+1000","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：每次释放后提升的技能伤害增加至"},{"text":"35%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"4","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：速度值"},{"text":"+5","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：伤害系数增加至"},{"text":"480%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"5","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：速度值"},{"text":"+10","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：携带【厄运丧钟】的单位阵亡后，该效果转移给攻击力最高的敌方"}]}]},"moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}}]}},{"key":"OheDvZgJbf7d8zJ9","type":"upgrade-info","data":{"title":"潜能","isShowTabs":false,"tabs":[],"upgradeList":[{"key":"0.685c02bd78f9","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/382722.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.901c446764fac8","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/389425.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.c824ad3488246","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/960068.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【那时候，他和其他E-07区的混混没什么区别。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他一脚踩进小巷地面的泥泞里，脏水溅在他的腿上和单薄的衣服上，腹中的饥饿被恐惧暂时压制下去，但筋疲力竭的眩晕感却在加剧。他手里紧攥着一袋伊瑟币，一步也不敢停下，后面的人越追越紧，脚步声与咒骂声几乎要贴上他的脊背。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"突然，他感到一阵失衡，他的衣服被人拽住，紧接着向前倒去一一后面的家伙终究是追上了他。他拼命挣扎，但是少年瘦削的身体怎么都推不动不断扑上来的那么多人，他只能下意识地蜷缩身体，护住头和腹部，最中间是那袋伊瑟币。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「反了你了，连踯躅街的仓库都敢偷，还打了我们那么多兄弟！这顿揍，你别想跑！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"追上来的踯躅街喽啰们恶狠狠地咒骂着，拳头和脚像雨点一样落在他身上。他一言不发地忍受着，紧紧抱住那袋偷来的伊瑟币一一没有什么特别的理由，如果现在放手，那他就什么都没有了，不仅这一顿打要白挨，之后更会面临寒冷和饥饿的威胁。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「够了，停下！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在他的意识彻底模糊之前，一个声音喝止了这场暴行，恍惚中，他听见那些踯躅街的喽啰们一个个站起身，毕恭毕敬地说着「大当家」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这家伙有点本事，先带回去。要是他愿意将功赎罪，为踯躅街效力，留他一条命也未尝不可。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【他攀上王座，终于感受到将力量和权利握在手中有多令人满足。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「呸，不过是条野狗，还真把自己当回事了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他推开门，走进踯躅街的据点，自动忽略了那些无关紧要的诋毁。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在加入了踯躅街后，他终于免受饥饿和寒冷的困扰，而他的力量，也在一点点变得更强，强到连「大当家」也不得不对他的力量感到忌惮。但他并不在意，他生长于E-07，自然也深谙踯躅街唯一的秩序—一「力量就是一切」。而现在，只要他想，他就能轻易地得到E-07的一切。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在不久前的「节目」里，他击败了过去的冠军，成为了新一任的守擂者。现在的他，赢得了E-07的最高话语权，E-07的每个人，都不得不对他的力量敬畏三分，至于那些不服管教的嘴硬的家伙，他们总有一天会知道自己的力量有多恐怖，没必要白花力气去教训他们。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他无视了那两个神经紧绷的门卫，在他们的注视中推开沉重的双开门。房间里，当初收留他的「大当家」坐在书桌后的椅子上，看见他进来时，「大当家」就站了起来。他走到「大当家」面前，无言地注视着对方，而「大当家」也对他的意图了然于心，并没有任何反抗，只是将代表踯躅街首领的信物交给了他。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"从那天开始，柯洛罗成为了踯躅街和整个E-07的王。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【那一天，他的王座轰然倒塌。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"疼痛、眩晕、想吐。这是他睁开眼以后，第一时间感受到的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"眼前的天花板像是在做无规律的旋转，他不得不闭上眼睛，努力地想让思绪回笼，搞清眼前的情况。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"很快，他就想起了自己昏迷前最后的记忆。那是「节目」的最终决赛，他作为守擂者出战，而前来挑战的，是一个来自美梦俱乐部的、过去从未见过的毛头小子。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「只需要10秒，他家伙就会跪在自己面前。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他如此傲慢地想。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"然而，随着代表比赛开始的铃声响起，他在一瞬间感觉到了恐怖的原质能量。那力量是如此强大，就像能轻易吞没他的海啸，伴随着剧痛和猛烈的光芒，他失去了意识一一他失败了，败在了一个名不见经传的毛头小子手里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"当他醒来以后，E-07已经不再是过去的那个E-07了，他自己也因为重伤，远不如之前强大。随着他这个「旧王」的溃败，原本就不服他的一部分踯躅街成员顺理成章地背叛了他，踯躅街分裂成了数不清的小势力，每个人都在唾弃他，庆祝着他的失败。有那么一瞬间，他开始怀疑自己过去的所作所为是不是错的，但这个想法很快就被否定了一一那些唾弃他的家伙和他一样，他们也"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"深谙E-07的规矩，「力量就是一切」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那些人，全都是墙头草，谁更强就倒向谁。只要他能获得更强的力量，强到足以从那个毛头小子手里抢回「节目」冠军的位置，他就能再次成为E-07的王。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而这时，一个声音恰到好处地在他耳边响起。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你，看起来很需要力量。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出，连击"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 134|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，爆伤，爆伤/攻击加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":" 单体持续输出极高，适合重构兵祸，协会boss，幻音剧场，暗笼激斗等需要持续输出的关卡，传说是某位头戴套子玩家的爱将，在pve中披荆斩棘，战无不胜"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12乘胜追击+8狂怒+6爆裂利刃","bold":true}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"白撩武者","bold":true}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_277/50364/842288/2025/7/18/164292.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"iIdiP6ScHTeG0HKS","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
